smtp.title: Email server (SMTP)
smtp.subtitle: Configure the outgoing mail server used to send invitations, recovery links and notifications.
smtp.envNote: These values come from the server environment. Saving here stores a database override that takes precedence.

fields.senderEmailHint: The "from" address for all outgoing mail.
fields.tlsHint: Encrypt the connection to the mail server.
fields.clientHint: Optional. The hostname this server announces to the SMTP server.

test.title: Send a test email
test.subtitle: Send a test message through the settings above — you don't need to save first.
test.success: Test email sent. See the server trace below.

selfReg.title: Self registration
selfReg.subtitle: Let people create their own account when their email matches an allowed domain. When off, only administrators can invite users.
selfReg.enableHint: When on, a visitor whose email domain is on the list can sign up without an invitation.
selfReg.domainsHint: One domain per line (e.g. example.com). A leading @ is optional; invalid entries are dropped.
selfReg.noDomains: Add at least one valid domain, or turn self registration off.
